# Copilot instructions

## Build, test, lint
No build, test, or lint commands are defined in this repository.

## High-level architecture
- Main project context and requirements are captured in `/doc/SU26SWP08 - Hệ thống quản lý tòa nhà gửi xe - Parking Building Management System.md`.
- `/doc/Skills/userstorySkills.md` defines how to convert requirements into user stories and the expected output format.
- User story outputs should be kept at `/doc/website-bao-chi-user-stories.md` and `/doc/website-bao-chi-user-stories.xlsx` (per the export convention in userstorySkills).

## Key conventions
- User stories use: "As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit]".
- Keep one role and one feature per story; avoid "and".
- Non-functional requirements use roles like Site Owner, Security Admin, Operations, or Publisher.
- User stories are presented as a table with columns: ID, Role, Feature, Benefit, User Story.
- Export user stories to `/doc/website-bao-chi-user-stories.md` and `/doc/website-bao-chi-user-stories.xlsx`.
